---
title: "Current Projects"
# website:
#   sidebar: 
#     - title: "Projects"
#       style: "docked"
#       background: light
#       contents: 
#         - current_projects.qmd
#         - past_projects.qmd
---

### [Baylor Quarto Theme](https://github.com/nathenbyford/Baylor_theme)

Clean and reproducable presentation template for making reveal.js presentations with quarto. Theme includes Baylor specific design ques and other helpful extentions.

### [Polar bear spatio-temporal forcasting project](bears.qmd)

Final project for Spatial statistics (STA 5377) looking into spatio-temporal forcasting methods on [USGS Southern Beaufort Sea Polar Bear Data](https://alaska.usgs.gov/products/data.php?dataid=193).
